cards.title: Number of Days CGM Worn
cards.claim_zh: 佩戴CGM天数是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Number of Days CGM Worn is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Percentage of Time CGM Active
cards.claim_zh: CGM活跃时间百分比是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Percentage of time CGM is active is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Mean Glucose
cards.claim_zh: 平均血糖是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Mean Glucose is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Estimated A1c (eA1C)
cards.claim_zh: 估算糖化血红蛋白(eA1C)是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Estimated A1c (eA1C) is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Glycemic Variability (%CV or SD)
cards.claim_zh: 血糖变异度（%CV或SD）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Glycemic Variability measured as %CV or SD is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间>250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的重度高血糖标准化CGM指标。
cards.claim_en: Time >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for severe hyperglycemia defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time >180 mg/dL (>10.0 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间>180 mg/dL（>10.0 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的高血糖时间（TAR）标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time >180 mg/dL (>10.0 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for hyperglycemia (Time Above Range, TAR) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time in Range (TIR) 70-180 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 时间70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）即目标范围内时间（TIR），是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for Time in Range (TIR) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的低血糖时间（TBR 1级）标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for hypoglycemia (Time Below Range, TBR level 1) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的临床显著低血糖时间（TBR 2级）标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for clinically significant hypoglycemia (TBR level 2) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: LBGI & HBGI Risk Indices
cards.claim_zh: 低血糖指数（LBGI）和高血糖指数（HBGI）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化风险指数。
cards.claim_en: Low Blood Glucose Index (LBGI) and High Blood Glucose Index (HBGI) are standardized CGM risk indices defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Hypoglycemia and Hyperglycemia Episodes (15 min)
cards.claim_zh: 低血糖和高血糖发作次数（以15分钟为阈值）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标。
cards.claim_en: Episodes of hypoglycemia and hyperglycemia (using a 15 min threshold) are standardized CGM metrics defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Area Under the Curve (AUC)
cards.claim_zh: 曲线下面积（AUC）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Area under the curve (AUC) is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time Blocks (24-h, day, night)
cards.claim_zh: 时间段（24小时、白天、夜间）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Time Blocks (24-hour, day, night) are standardized CGM metrics defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Ambulatory Glucose Profile (AGP) for CGM Reporting
cards.claim_zh: 动态血糖谱（AGP）被推荐作为CGM报告的可视化工具，为2017年CGM指标国际共识的一部分。
cards.claim_en: The Ambulatory Glucose Profile (AGP) is recommended for CGM report visualization as part of the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Three Requirements for Effective CGM Data Use
cards.claim_zh: 有效利用CGM数据以优化临床结局需要：1）评估CGM血糖状态的共同指标；2）血糖数据和CGM每日图谱的图形化可视化；3）明确的循证临床目标。
cards.claim_en: Effective use of CGM data to optimize clinical outcomes requires: 1) common metrics for assessment of CGM glycemic status; 2) graphical visualization of the glucose data and CGM daily profile; and 3) clear evidence-based clinical targets.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: ATTD 2017 International Panel on CGM Metrics
cards.claim_zh: 2017年2月，糖尿病先进技术与治疗大会（ATTD）召集了国际专家临床医生和研究人员小组，定义了评估CGM数据的核心指标。
cards.claim_en: In February 2017, the Advanced Technologies and Treatments for Diabetes (ATTD) Congress convened an international panel of expert clinicians and researchers to define core metrics for assessing CGM data.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM Minimum Wear Duration
cards.claim_zh: 为确保血糖数据解读的准确性，建议连续佩戴CGM至少14天。
cards.claim_en: A minimum of 14 days of CGM wear is recommended for accurate glucose data interpretation.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM Active Data Threshold
cards.claim_zh: CGM在14天佩戴期间应至少有70%的时间处于活跃状态，以确保数据可靠性。
cards.claim_en: CGM should be active for at least 70% of the 14-day wear period to ensure data reliability.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Glycemic Variability Target %CV
cards.claim_zh: 血糖变异性目标为%CV ≤36%。部分研究表明，对于使用胰岛素或磺脲类药物的患者，更低的目标（<33%）可提供额外的低血糖保护。
cards.claim_en: Glycemic variability target is %CV ≤36%. Some studies suggest lower targets (<33%) provide additional protection against hypoglycemia for those receiving insulin or sulfonylureas.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR Level 2: >250 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 高于范围时间2级定义为血糖读数及时间 >250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Above Range Level 2 is defined as percentage of readings and time >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR Level 1: 181-250 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 高于范围时间1级定义为血糖读数及时间 181-250 mg/dL（10.1-13.9 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Above Range Level 1 is defined as percentage of readings and time 181-250 mg/dL (10.1-13.9 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time In Range (TIR): 70-180 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 目标范围内时间（TIR）定义为血糖读数及时间 70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time In Range (TIR) is defined as percentage of readings and time 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR Level 1: 54-69 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 低于范围时间1级定义为血糖读数及时间 54-69 mg/dL（3.0-3.8 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Below Range Level 1 is defined as percentage of readings and time 54-69 mg/dL (3.0-3.8 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR Level 2: <54 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 低于范围时间2级定义为血糖读数及时间 <54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Below Range Level 2 is defined as percentage of readings and time <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: 70% CGM Use Correlates with 3-Month Metrics
cards.claim_zh: 近14天内CGM使用率>70%与3个月的平均血糖、范围内时间和高血糖指标强相关。
cards.claim_en: >70% use of CGM over the recent 14 days correlates strongly with 3 months of mean glucose, time in ranges, and hyperglycemia metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 1 Diabetes Weaker Hypoglycemia Correlations
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病患者中，14天CGM数据与3个月结局在低血糖和血糖变异性方面的相关性较弱；更长的采样周期并未显示能提高这些相关性。
cards.claim_en: In individuals with type 1 diabetes, correlations between 14-day CGM data and 3-month outcomes are weaker for hypoglycemia and glycemic variability; longer sampling periods have not been shown to increase these correlations.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Variable Glycemic Control Needs Longer CGM Period
cards.claim_zh: 对于血糖控制变异性较大的个体，可能需要更长的CGM数据采集周期（如4周）以评估低血糖暴露。
cards.claim_en: Longer CGM data collection periods (e.g., 4 weeks) may be required for individuals with more variable glycemic control to investigate hypoglycemia exposure.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，推荐的葡萄糖目标范围内时间（TIR）目标为>70%的读数（>16小时48分钟/天），目标血糖范围为70–180 mg/dL（3.9–10.0 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, the recommended time in range (TIR) target is >70% of readings (>16 hr 48 min/day), with a target glucose range of 70–180 mg/dL (3.9–10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <70 mg/dL target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的低于目标范围时间（TBR）应<4%（<1小时/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) for glucose <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <4% (<1 hr/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <54 mg/dL (clinically significant hypoglycemia) target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的低于目标范围时间（TBR）应<1%（<15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) for glucose <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) should be <1% (<15 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >180 mg/dL target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖>180 mg/dL（>10.0 mmol/L）的高于目标范围时间（TAR）应<25%（<6小时/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time above range (TAR) for glucose >180 mg/dL (>10.0 mmol/L) should be <25% (<6 hr/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >250 mg/dL target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖>250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）的高于目标范围时间（TAR）应<5%（<1小时12分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time above range (TAR) for glucose >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L) should be <5% (<1 hr 12 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年/高风险1型/2型糖尿病患者，推荐的TIR目标为>50%的读数（>12小时/天），目标血糖范围为70–180 mg/dL（3.9–10.0 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: For older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2 individuals, the recommended TIR target is >50% of readings (>12 hr/day), with a target glucose range of 70–180 mg/dL (3.9–10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <70 mg/dL target for older/high-risk
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年/高风险1型/2型糖尿病患者，血糖<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的TBR应<1%（<15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2 individuals, TBR for glucose <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <1% (<15 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >250 mg/dL target for older/high-risk
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年/高风险1型/2型糖尿病患者，血糖>250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）的TAR应<10%（<2小时24分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2 individuals, TAR for glucose >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L) should be <10% (<2 hr 24 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Clinically significant benefit per 5% TIR increase (Type 1/Type 2)
cards.claim_zh: TIR每增加5个百分点，与1型/2型糖尿病的临床显著获益相关。
cards.claim_en: Each incremental 5% increase in TIR is associated with clinically significant benefits for Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，推荐的TIR目标为>70%（>16小时48分钟/天），目标血糖范围为63–140 mg/dL（3.5–7.8 mmol/L）。妊娠期间血糖水平生理性降低。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, the recommended TIR target is >70% (>16 hr 48 min/day), with a target glucose range of 63–140 mg/dL (3.5–7.8 mmol/L). Glucose levels are physiologically lower during pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <63 mg/dL target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，血糖<63 mg/dL（<3.5 mmol/L）的TBR应<4%（<1小时/天）。妊娠期间血糖水平生理性降低。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, TBR for glucose <63 mg/dL (<3.5 mmol/L) should be <4% (<1 hr/day). Glucose levels are physiologically lower during pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <54 mg/dL (clinically significant) target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，血糖<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的TBR应<1%（<15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, TBR for glucose <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) should be <1% (<15 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >140 mg/dL target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，血糖>140 mg/dL（>7.8 mmol/L）的TAR应<25%（<6小时/天）。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, TAR for glucose >140 mg/dL (>7.8 mmol/L) should be <25% (<6 hr/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for pregnancy Type 2 / GDM
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期2型/GDM，目标血糖范围为63–140 mg/dL（3.5–7.8 mmol/L）。具体的TIR/TBR/TAR百分比参考妊娠章节。目标范围内时间百分比基于有限证据。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 2 / GDM, the target glucose range is 63–140 mg/dL (3.5–7.8 mmol/L). Specific TIR/TBR/TAR percentages are referenced to the Pregnancy section. Percentages of time in range are based on limited evidence.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Clinically significant benefit per 5% TIR increase (pregnancy Type 1)
cards.claim_zh: TIR每增加5个百分点，与妊娠期1型糖尿病的临床显著获益相关。
cards.claim_en: Each incremental 5% increase in TIR is associated with clinically significant benefits for Pregnancy Type 1.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 2 diabetes has less glycemic variability and hypoglycemia than type 1
cards.claim_zh: 2型糖尿病患者的血糖变异性通常低于1型糖尿病(46)。因此，2型糖尿病患者通常可以在减少低血糖的同时获得更多目标范围内时间(4)。
cards.claim_en: In type 2 diabetes, there is generally less glycemic variability and hypoglycemia than in type 1 diabetes (46). Thus, people with type 2 diabetes can often achieve more time in target range while minimizing hypoglycemia (4).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM use in type 2 diabetes: TIR improved 10.3% (Beck et al.)
cards.claim_zh: Beck等人研究显示，2型糖尿病患者在使用CGM 24周后，TIR提高了10.3%（从55.6%升至61.3%），同时TBR略有下降(4)。
cards.claim_en: As demonstrated by Beck et al., individuals with type 2 diabetes increased their TIR by 10.3% (from 55.6% to 61.3%) after 24 weeks of CGM use with slight reductions in TBR (4).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 1 and type 2 diabetes targets combined into one set
cards.claim_zh: 1型和2型糖尿病的目标值足够接近，因此合并为一组目标（妊娠期除外）。
cards.claim_en: Targets for type 1 diabetes and type 2 diabetes were close enough to combine them into one set of targets, outside of pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 1 targets informed by hybrid closed-loop therapy capability
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型糖尿病患者，其目标值的设定参考了混合闭环疗法达到这些目标的能力(11)，首个商业化混合闭环系统已经上市。
cards.claim_en: For people with type 1 diabetes, the targets are informed by the ability to reach the targets with hybrid closed-loop therapy (11), the first example of which is now commercially available.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM with MDI can reach TIR targets in type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 近期研究表明，使用多次每日注射(MDI)的个体也有可能通过CGM达到这些目标(6)。
cards.claim_en: Recent studies have shown the potential of reaching these targets with CGM in individuals using multiple daily injections (MDI) (6).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: SGLT-2 agents help type 1 diabetes increase TIR
cards.claim_zh: 新型药物如钠-葡萄糖协同转运蛋白2(SGLT-2)抑制剂的有益效果已帮助1型糖尿病患者提高TIR(49-51)。
cards.claim_en: The beneficial effects of new medications, such as sodium glucose cotransporter-2 (SGLT-2) agents have helped individuals with type 1 diabetes increase TIR (49-51).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target: T1/T2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型和2型糖尿病成人患者，推荐的目标范围内时间（TIR）为70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）范围内的时间>70%。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, the recommended time in range (TIR) is >70% of time spent within 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR target: T1/T2 diabetes (<70 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型和2型糖尿病成人患者，低于70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的低血糖时间（TBR）应<4%。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) at <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <4%.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target: older/high-risk T1/T2
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年和/或高风险的1型或2型糖尿病患者，推荐的目标范围内时间（TIR）为70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）范围内的时间>50%。
cards.claim_en: For older and/or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, the recommended time in range (TIR) at 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L) is >50%.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR target: older/high-risk T1/T2 (<70 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年和/或高风险的1型或2型糖尿病患者，低于70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的低血糖时间（TBR）应<1%，更强调减少低血糖发生。
cards.claim_en: For older and/or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) at <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <1%, placing greater emphasis on reducing hypoglycemia.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR pregnancy target: GDM/T2 (tight range)
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期糖尿病或2型糖尿病妊娠期患者，目标范围内时间（TIR）目标为>70%，范围为更严格的63-140 mg/dL（3.5-7.8 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy with gestational diabetes or Type 2 diabetes, the time in range (TIR) target is >70% within a tighter range of 63-140 mg/dL (3.5-7.8 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR correlates with diabetes complications
cards.claim_zh: 近期研究表明，TIR（70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]）与糖尿病并发症存在相关性，且TIR与A1C之间也存在关联。
cards.claim_en: Recent studies have shown correlations of TIR (70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]) with diabetes complications, as well as a relationship between TIR and A1C.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR reduction and diabetic retinopathy progression hazard
cards.claim_zh: 基于DCCT数据集（7点血糖谱），TIR每降低10%，糖尿病视网膜病变进展的风险比增加64%（Beck等）。
cards.claim_en: The hazard rate for diabetic retinopathy progression increased by 64% for each 10% reduction in TIR, based on the DCCT data set with 7-point blood glucose profiles (Beck et al.).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR reduction and microalbuminuria development hazard
cards.claim_zh: 基于DCCT数据集，TIR每降低10%，微量白蛋白尿发生的风险比增加40%（Beck等）。
cards.claim_en: The hazard rate for microalbuminuria development increased by 40% for each 10% reduction in TIR, based on the DCCT data set (Beck et al.).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Glucose thresholds linked to severe hypoglycemia risk
cards.claim_zh: 对DCCT数据集的事后分析显示，血糖水平<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）和<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）与严重低血糖风险增加相关。
cards.claim_en: A post-hoc analysis of the DCCT data set showed a link between glucose levels of <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) and <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) and an increased risk for severe hypoglycemia.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: DR prevalence decreases with increasing TIR in type 2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 在一项针对3,262名2型糖尿病患者的研究中，视网膜病变程度越严重的患者（VTDR、中度NPDR、轻度NPDR）在目标血糖范围70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）内的时间显著更短，DR患病率随TIR升高而降低（Lu等）。
cards.claim_en: In a study of 3,262 individuals with type 2 diabetes, individuals with more advanced diabetic retinopathy (VTDR, moderate NPDR, mild NPDR) spent significantly less time within the target glucose range of 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L), and prevalence of DR decreased with increasing TIR (Lu et al.).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 70% corresponds to A1C approximately 7%
cards.claim_zh: 在一项涵盖545名1型糖尿病成人的四项随机试验分析中，TIR（70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]）70%与A1C约7%（53 mmol/mol）强相关。
cards.claim_en: In an analysis of four randomized trials encompassing 545 adults with type 1 diabetes, a TIR (70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]) of 70% strongly corresponded with an A1C of approximately 7% (53 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 50% corresponds to A1C approximately 8%
cards.claim_zh: 在同一项四项随机试验分析中（545名1型糖尿病成人），TIR 50%与A1C约8%（64 mmol/mol）强相关。
cards.claim_en: In the same analysis of four randomized trials (545 adults with type 1 diabetes), a TIR of 50% strongly corresponded with an A1C of approximately 8% (64 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: 10% TIR increase corresponds to 0.5% A1C decrease
cards.claim_zh: TIR每增加10%（每天2.4小时），A1C约降低0.5%（5.0 mmol/mol），基于四项1型糖尿病随机试验数据。
cards.claim_en: An increase in TIR of 10% (2.4 hours per day) corresponded to a decrease in A1C of approximately 0.5% (5.0 mmol/mol), based on data from four randomized trials in type 1 diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR-A1C association confirmed across 18 RCTs
cards.claim_zh: Vigersky等对18项随机对照试验（纳入超过2,500名1型和2型糖尿病患者，覆盖广泛年龄和A1C水平）的分析显示了相似的TIR-A1C关联。
cards.claim_en: Similar TIR-A1C associations were seen in an analysis of 18 RCTs by Vigersky et al. that included over 2,500 individuals with type 1 diabetes and type 2 diabetes over a wide range of ages and A1C levels.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR-A1C linear relationship in type 1 diabetes (Beck et al.)
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病患者中（n=545），TIR（70-180 mg/dL）每增加10%，A1C约降低0.5%（5.5 mmol/mol）。TIR 50%时A1C约7.9%（63 mmol/mol）；TIR 70%时A1C约7.0%（53 mmol/mol）；TIR 80%时A1C约6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: In type 1 diabetes (n=545), every 10% increase in TIR (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to approximately 0.5% (5.5 mmol/mol) reduction in A1C. At 50% TIR, estimated A1C is 7.9% (63 mmol/mol); at 70% TIR, A1C is 7.0% (53 mmol/mol); at 80% TIR, A1C is 6.5% (48 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR-A1C linear relationship in type 1 and type 2 diabetes (Vigersky et al.)
cards.claim_zh: 在1型和2型糖尿病患者中（n=1,137），TIR（70-180 mg/dL）每增加10%，A1C约降低0.8%（8.7 mmol/mol）。TIR 50%时A1C约8.3%（67 mmol/mol）；TIR 70%时A1C约6.7%（50 mmol/mol）；TIR 80%时A1C约5.9%（42 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: In type 1 and type 2 diabetes combined (n=1,137), every 10% increase in TIR (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to approximately 0.8% (8.7 mmol/mol) reduction in A1C. At 50% TIR, estimated A1C is 8.3% (67 mmol/mol); at 70% TIR, A1C is 6.7% (50 mmol/mol); at 80% TIR, A1C is 5.9% (42 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 70% corresponds to A1C ~7.0% in type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病中，TIR 70%（70-180 mg/dL）对应的A1C约为7.0%（53 mmol/mol）（95% CI: 5.6-8.3%）。
cards.claim_en: A TIR of 70% (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to an estimated A1C of 7.0% (53 mmol/mol) in type 1 diabetes (95% CI: 5.6-8.3%).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 80% corresponds to A1C ~6.5% in type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病中，TIR 80%（70-180 mg/dL）对应的A1C约为6.5%（48 mmol/mol）（95% CI: 5.2-7.8%）。
cards.claim_en: A TIR of 80% (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to an estimated A1C of 6.5% (48 mmol/mol) in type 1 diabetes (95% CI: 5.2-7.8%).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy TIR 70-140 mg/dL: first trimester ~50%, third trimester ~60%
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病孕妇中（瑞典/CONCEPTT数据），TIR（63-140 mg/dL / 3.5-7.8 mmol/L）在妊娠早期约为50%，在妊娠晚期改善至约60%（现代产前护理条件下）。
cards.claim_en: In pregnant women with type 1 diabetes (Sweden/CONCEPTT data), TIR (63-140 mg/dL / 3.5-7.8 mmol/L) is approximately 50% in the first trimester, improving to approximately 60% in the third trimester with contemporary antenatal care.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy TBR <63 mg/dL target <4% is safely achievable
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型糖尿病孕妇，TBR <63 mg/dL（<3.5 mmol/L）<4%的目标是安全可达到的，尤其是在妊娠早期之后。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant women with type 1 diabetes, the TBR <63 mg/dL (<3.5 mmol/L) recommendation of <4% is safely achievable, especially after the first trimester.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy: 33% of women achieved 70% TIR 63-140 mg/dL in final weeks
cards.claim_zh: 33%的1型糖尿病孕妇在妊娠最后（>34周）达到了推荐的70% TIR（63-140 mg/dL / 3.5-7.8 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: 33% of pregnant women with type 1 diabetes achieved the recommendation of 70% TIR 63-140 mg/dL (3.5-7.8 mmol/L) in the final (>34) weeks of pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy: first longitudinal CGM data showed 13-percentage point TIR increase
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期首个纵向CGM数据显示TIR增加了13个百分点（TIR 70-140 mg/dL / 3.9-7.8 mmol/L从43%升至56%）。TBR <50 mg/dL从6%降至4%，但使用旧一代传感器时TBR <70 mg/dL仍较高（13-15%）。
cards.claim_en: The first longitudinal CGM data in pregnancy demonstrated a 13-percentage point increase in TIR (43% to 56% TIR 70-140 mg/dL [3.9-7.8 mmol/L]). TBR <50 mg/dL reduced from 6% to 4%, though TBR <70 mg/dL remained high (13-15%) with older generation sensors.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR improvement 5-7% reduces LGA risk in pregnancy
cards.claim_zh: 第二和第三孕期TIR提高5-7%与LGA及新生儿不良结局风险降低相关，包括巨大儿、肩难产、新生儿低血糖和NICU入院。
cards.claim_en: A 5-7% higher TIR during the second and third trimesters is associated with decreased risk of LGA and neonatal outcomes, including macrosomia, shoulder dystocia, neonatal hypoglycemia and NICU admissions.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 2 diabetes pregnancy achieves TIR 90%
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期2型糖尿病女性TIR可达90%，高血糖时间比1型糖尿病女性少三分之一。
cards.claim_en: Women with type 2 diabetes in pregnancy achieve TIR of 90%, spending one third less time hyperglycemic than women with type 1 diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Older/high-risk individuals: reduce time below 70 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年和/或高风险糖尿病患者，血糖目标应个体化且保守，重点关注减少低于70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的时间比例并防止过度高血糖。
cards.claim_en: For older and/or high-risk individuals with diabetes, glycemic targets should be individualized and conservative, with a strong focus on reducing the percentage of time spent <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) and preventing excessive hyperglycemia.
cards.population: older and/or high-risk individuals with diabetes

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <70 mg/dL target: less than 1 hour per day
cards.claim_zh: 将血糖<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的时间减少到每天少于1小时。
cards.claim_en: Reduce time spent <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) to less than one hour per day.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <54 mg/dL target: less than 15 minutes per day
cards.claim_zh: 将血糖<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的时间减少到每天少于15分钟。
cards.claim_en: Reduce time spent <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) to less than 15 minutes per day.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: ISPAD A1C target for pediatric and young adults ≤25 years
cards.claim_zh: 对于有综合医疗条件的儿童、青少年和≤25岁成人，A1C目标为7.0%（53 mmol/mol）（ISPAD推荐）。
cards.claim_en: An A1C target of 7.0% (53 mmol/mol) can be used in children, adolescents and adults ≤25 years who have access to comprehensive care (ISPAD).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Higher A1C goal <7.5% for high-risk pediatric/young adult situations
cards.claim_zh: 在以下情况下，更高的A1C目标（如<7.5%[<58 mmol/mol]）可能更合适：无法表达低血糖症状、低血糖感知缺失、严重低血糖病史、无法获得类似物胰岛素和/或先进胰岛素输送技术、无法定期检测血糖。
cards.claim_en: A higher A1C goal (e.g., <7.5% [<58 mmol/mol]) may be more appropriate in the following situations: inability to articulate hypoglycemia symptoms; hypoglycemia unawareness; history of severe hypoglycemia; lack of access to analog insulins and/or advanced insulin delivery technology; inability to regularly check glucose.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: A1C <7.5% equates to ~60% TIR
cards.claim_zh: A1C目标<7.5%（<58 mmol/mol）对应TIR目标约60%（表4）。
cards.claim_en: An A1C goal of <7.5% (<58 mmol/mol) equates to a TIR target of ~60% (Table 4).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Incremental 5% TIR improvement is clinically significant
cards.claim_zh: 即使是小的、渐进性的改善也能产生显著的血糖获益。TIR提高5%在改善血糖控制方面具有临床意义。
cards.claim_en: Even small, incremental improvements yield significant glycemic benefits. A 5% increase in TIR is clinically significant in improving glycemic control.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: AGP retrospective analysis supports collaborative goal setting
cards.claim_zh: 利用标准化数据管理工具（如AGP）对CGM数据进行回顾性分析，使临床医生和糖尿病患者能够协作识别问题领域并设定可实现的目标。
cards.claim_en: Retrospective analysis of CGM data utilizing standardized data management tools such as the AGP enables clinicians and people with diabetes to work collaboratively in identifying problem areas and then set achievable goals.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time in ranges as clinical targets complementary to A1C
cards.claim_zh: 时间在范围内（目标范围内、低于范围、高于范围）作为临床目标和结局测量指标是适当且有用的，可补充A1C用于广泛的糖尿病人群。
cards.claim_en: Time in ranges (within target range, below range, above range) are both appropriate and useful as clinical targets and outcome measurements that complement A1C for a wide range of people with diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range
